dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp builds up using rocks and gets onto the ship

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I'm glad to see you commander

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich
dialogueItems.text: Glad to see you alive Merzp didn't think you would survive on your own.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Funny, now get me out of here.
